title: Selecting Dates in Timeline Column
excerpt: I cannot figure out how to select dates in a Timleine column that span many months.  When I try to arrow forward from Jan to Dec, it either brings currently selected range forward (e.g. 30 days) or it sets the value to t…

posts.author: EricHi (Eric Hills)
posts.cookedHtml: I cannot figure out how to select dates in a Timleine column that span many months. When I try to arrow forward from Jan to Dec, it either brings currently selected range forward (e.g. 30 days) or it sets the value to the sinlge date that I select (eg Dec 31). I see older videos showing where you clicked on the left and right side of the field to set start and finish, but looks like those are done away with. Sorry if this is a newbie Q, but can someone explain how it works? thx

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @EricHi

Welcome to the community. When you click on the timeline the first day you select is that start. then use the arrows to go forward as many months you want and click a date. That will become the end of the timeline.

posts.author: EricHi (Eric Hills)
posts.cookedHtml: thanks Bas! I guess I missed the obvious.
